meta.name: WellSpring Egypt â€” Brand Design Spec
meta.source: WSE Brand Identity Guidelines V4 (2022) + WellSpring operational segmentation (2024+)
meta.purpose: Machine-readable brand reference for design tools. Apply these tokens and rules to any WellSpring branded output (decks, docs, social, web, proposals).
meta.authority_note: Hex codes are the source of truth for digital. RGB values are derived from hex. The 2022 PDF listed RGB/PMS values that do not match the digital hex; the hex codes here are correct and override the PDF's RGB/PMS.

brand.vision: To empower the new generation to transform the Egyptian community from the inside out.
brand.mission: Bringing experiential learning to life through fun environments to the new generation.
brand.primary_tagline: Live â€” from the Inside Out
brand.tone: Warm, energetic, community-focused, Egyptian culture-aware; bilingual (EN/AR) where relevant.

ws_blue_1.role: Primary / dominant brand color. Section bars, accents, top & bottom bars.

ws_green.role: Secondary. Taglines, supporting titles, divider accents, the logo leaf.

white.role: Headings & body text on dark backgrounds.

gradient_1.note: WS-G Gradient 1: Blue 2 â†’ Blue 1 â†’ Blue 2.

text_body_soft.role: Descriptive body copy on dark bg â€” softer than white.

text_dark_label.role: Text on light or colored backgrounds.

accent_orange.role: Tertiary accent. One element per slide max, never dominant.

rules: Primary colors for almost everything: #147cab, #a0be55, white.
NEVER use forest green as a full slide/page background â€” not a brand color. Dark green allowed only as a card fill inside a navy layout.
Avoid off-brand colors (random purples, browns, reds) outside designated villain/contrast slides.
On dark backgrounds use white text; light-blue-grey (#c8e0ec) for softer body copy.

helvetica.use: When Myriad Pro unavailable (web, MS Office)

powerpoint_safe.note: Calibri is the PowerPoint-safe substitute for Poppins/Myriad Pro. Do NOT use Arial, Times, or other generic fonts.

rules: Headlines: Title Case; stagger lines for movement; tight leading; manually kern display type.
Body: left-aligned (ragged right); no hyphenation; single space between sentences; separate paragraphs with a line break (no indents).
Lead-ins: first sentence 4â€“6pt larger, in color, inline with body copy.
Avoid widows, orphans, and unnatural line breaks.

logo.mark_description: Water drop + green leaf. May be used as a standalone design element.

mark_variations.name: primary_reversed_white
mark_variations.use: Dark backgrounds where WS Green integrity is maintained

mark_variations.name: secondary_reversed_white
mark_variations.use: Dark green backgrounds where WS Green cannot be maintained

logo.exclusion_zone: Clear space on all sides equal to the height of the 'W' in the WellSpring logo. Same minimum distance from page edges.
never_do: Stretch or distort (scale must stay proportional).
Rearrange logo elements / separate the logo leaf from the logo.
Place full-color logo on a dark background â€” use the white/reversed version.

wellspring_main.use: All general WellSpring Egypt comms, umbrella proposals, corporate/Business Solutions materials, email signatures, letterheads.
wellspring_main.tagline: Live â€” from the Inside Out

kids_family.use: Kids & Families segment â€” day camp flyers, parent outreach, family proposals, school parent comms, B2C camp marketing.

next_g.use: Next G / Youth & Adolescents (14â€“22) â€” youth leadership, school programs, Gen Z social, youth partnerships.
next_g.tone: Bold, energetic, modern. Never on conservative corporate materials.

community_development.use: Community Development â€” NGO partnerships, government proposals, social enterprise, impact reports, CSR with social focus.
community_development.tagline: Lead â€” from the Inside Out

ws_foundation.use: Foundation-level / philanthropic / donor-facing / charitable CSR. Bilingual EN + AR.

selection_logic.context: General WellSpring Egypt proposal / email / doc
Youth program / Gen Z content / school program (14â€“22)

selection_logic.logo: white/reversed version of the relevant logo
full-color version of the relevant logo

leaf_element.note: Standalone leaf derived from the logo mark. Two variations: WS Green, or White at 15% opacity.
leaf_element.warning: The design-element leaf is DIFFERENT from the logo leaf â€” never separate the leaf from the logo itself.

wave.meaning: Life and renewal; key unifying element across divisions.

general_rules: Professional photography preferred; stock acceptable as fallback.
Candid non-professional photos only for website libraries â€” not promotional materials.
Subjects reflect the local Egyptian demographic and are dressed appropriately for Egyptian cultural context.

by_segment.business_solutions: Confident professionals, team interactions, corporate settings, coaching moments, light/airy backgrounds.
by_segment.kids_families: Joyful children, parent-child moments, camp activities, colorful and energetic group energy.
by_segment.next_g: Authentic youth portraits, peer dynamics, leadership moments, aspirational but real â€” not overly staged.
by_segment.community_development: Community gatherings, real people, impact moments, culturally grounded Egyptian settings.

business_solutions.offering: Team building, CSR programs, leadership workshops, corporate camps
business_solutions.core_angle: Invest in your people. Build a team that performs and connects.

kids_families.offering: Day camps, overnight camps, family programs, parent-child experiences
kids_families.tone: Warm, energetic, reassuring to parents, exciting to kids
kids_families.core_angle: Safe, fun, transformative experiences your kids will never forget.

next_g.offering: Leadership programs, youth camps, character development, school programs
next_g.tone: Bold, inspiring, direct, youth-facing â€” avoid corporate language
next_g.core_angle: Discover who you are. Lead from the inside out.

community_development.core_angle: Transforming communities from the inside out, one program at a time.

every_slide_must_have: Top bar: thin WS Blue (#147cab) full-width rectangle, height ~0.12", at y=0.
Bottom bar: thin WS Blue (#147cab) full-width rectangle, height ~0.125", at y=5.5".
Segment logo bottom-right (xâ‰ˆ8.25, yâ‰ˆ4.95, wâ‰ˆ1.55, hâ‰ˆ0.62). White logo on dark bg; full-color on light bg.
Footer text where applicable: 'Hotline: 19304 | www.wellspringegypt.com | Live â€” from the Inside Out' â€” small, muted, bottom-left.

patterns.two_panel_split: Left dark panel + right slightly different dark shade, separated by a thin WS Blue vertical line (w=0.1").
patterns.section_header_bar: Full-width WS Blue rectangle (hâ‰ˆ0.3") with white text at top of slide.
patterns.image_cards: Portrait images as cover-cropped rectangles; colored name label box below each.
patterns.stat_box: Dark fill (#042038) + colored border (1.5pt); large number in brand color, small white label below.
patterns.quote_box: Dark fill + 1pt colored border; italic bold text in accent color.
patterns.cover_slide: Left dark navy panel + WS Blue vertical accent stripe (wâ‰ˆ0.18"); right full-bleed image. Title stack: category label (WS Green, char-spaced) â†’ 'THE [THEME]' (white) â†’ title line 1 (WS Blue) â†’ title line 2 (WS Green) â†’ subtitle (teal italic) â†’ divider â†’ description. Tagline always in WS Green italic.
patterns.closing_slide: Left full-bleed character image; right section label (WS Green) â†’ headline (white + WS Blue) â†’ stats â†’ body â†’ WS Blue footer bar with tagline + contact. White logo over image bottom-left.

never_do: Any slide without the segment logo.
Forest green as a slide background.
Off-brand colors (random purples, browns, reds) outside villain slides.
Accent underlines beneath titles â€” use whitespace/contrast instead.
Text-only slides with no visual element.
Full-color logo on dark/navy background â€” use the white version.

business_card.front: LeafDrop mark, Name (bold), Title, Email, Phone (+201x), Hotline 19304, Address.

collateral.email_signature: Logo | Name | Title | Address | Mobile | Hotline: 19304 | Values list | Website | Social icons (FB, IG, YouTube).

letterhead.header: LeafDrop mark top center + date top right.
letterhead.footer: WellSpring logo + Address + info@wellspringegypt.com + Website + 'Facebook: WellSpring Egypt' + Hotline: 19304.

social: FB/IG posts: WellSpring logo top-left, partner logo (e.g. National Bank of Egypt) top-right when applicable.
Facebook cover: 16:9, wave graphic, camps photography.

contact.address: 7 Tag El Din El Sobki St, Ard El Golf, Heliopolis, Cairo, Egypt

quick_reference.heading_font: Fontin Sans / Poppins Bold (Calibri Bold in PowerPoint)
quick_reference.body_font: Myriad Pro / Helvetica / Poppins Regular (Calibri in PowerPoint)
quick_reference.logo_placement: Top-left or top-center (docs) / bottom-right (slides); always respect exclusion zone.
quick_reference.tagline: Live â€” from the Inside Out
